title: psylliostachys anceps
intro: Psylliostachys anceps, also known as Tibetan wormwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits associated with Psylliostachys anceps include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Psylliostachys anceps include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be obtained from the plant's leaves and stems, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
